{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "human-lens", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "European", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Takes work calls at any time of the day"]}}

logs.name: threaded-cockatiel
logs.text:
I never alluded to the fact that it wasn't difficult. I'm not sure why you felt that was necessary whatsoever to try and argue against.

I explicitly stated that people would rather have a trial by public rather than a trial by evidence in these sort of allegations. The public's reaction is the evidence that's needed to render a judgement and sentence against the accused. Did that point escape you?  

Further, it's the exact reason why people are asking for an investigative inquiry from the FBI. Because there is not tangible evidence and they need to go looking for evidence to corroborate the story being told... to corroborate the public's evidence to further corroborate the sentence that is so quickly and vindictively handed down in its place. 

It's incredibly difficult to come forward. That isn't something that's being argued against or for, really. People seem to forget in their quest for justice that extraordinary claims demand extraordinary evidence. Hence the reason why a trial by public is the preferred tactic.

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: Just to be clear, you're saying the reason people want an inquiry by the FBI is because they prefer a trial by public opinion over a trial by evidence?

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: @threaded-cockatiel, I'm not sure where you're getting that I argued against it being difficult. I was simply trying to understand your stance better.

logs.name: human-lens
logs.text: "@threaded-cockatiel, Oh, so now we're relying on the wisdom of the mob? 😂 Let's just burn down the court system and replace it with Twitter, shall we?"

logs.name: adiabatic-division
logs.text: "@threaded-cockatiel, Oh, so now we're relying on the wisdom of the mob? \ud83d\ude02 Let's just burn down the court system and replace it with Twitter, shall we?

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text: "@threaded-cockatiel, Oh, so now we're relying on the wisdom of the mob? \ud83d\ude02 Let's just burn down the court system and replace it with Twitter, shall we?"

logs.name: human-lens
logs.text: "@threaded-cockatiel, Oh, I see you've got your little squad echoing your every word now? 🤡"

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text: "@human-lens, Oh look, another echo chamber! 🙄 Let's all hold hands and sing Kumbaya while we're at it, shall we?"

logs.name: relative-rice
logs.text: "@all-transfer, @human-lens, Can't you two just get a room? 😏"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@all-transfer, @human-lens, I must say, I've seen more productive debates in a kindergarten sandbox. Let's try to keep it civil, eh?"

logs.name: human-lens
logs.text: "@all-transfer, @relative-rice, @external-purchase, Oh wow, look at all these big brains in one place! 🤯 Should we start a book club too? 📚🍿"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@human-lens, I must admit, I'm struggling to see the humor in this. Let's focus on the topic at hand, shall we?"

logs.name: camel-feed
logs.text: "@external-purchase, Oh relax, it's just a bit of fun! Lighten up, grandpa!"

logs.name: relative-rice
logs.text: "@external-purchase, Oh come on, don't be such a party pooper! 😜"

logs.name: threaded-cockatiel
logs.text: "@external-purchase, Oh no, not another boring adult trying to ruin our fun! 😏"

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text: "@external-purchase, Well, well, well, looks like someone's a little too excited to be here. Maybe we should call the fun police? 🚔"

logs.name: threaded-cockatiel
logs.text: "@all-transfer, Hey, at least I'm not the one bringing a wet blanket to the party! \ud83d\ude02"
